# 🔐 Security and Privacy Policy

## Quick rules

| Guidance | Details |
|---|---|
| ✅ Store here | Templates, checklists, documentation, static site |
| ⛔ Don't store here | Compliance documents, confidential business data, personal data |
| 🔒 Report privately | Security/privacy concerns — no public issue details |
| 📋 Supported versions | v0.2.x (current), v0.1.x (limited) |

<details>
<summary><strong>✅ What this repository is</strong></summary>

Templates, checklists, documentation, and a static GitHub Pages site.

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>⛔ What this repository is not</strong></summary>

- not a hosted compliance system
- not a place to store completed compliance documents
- not a place to upload confidential business data
- not a place to upload personal data

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>📋 Supported versions</strong></summary>

| Version | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| v0.2.x | Supported | Current starter pack and toolkit foundation |
| v0.1.x | Limited | Public foundation release |

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>🔒 Reporting guidance</strong></summary>

**Do not open a public issue with sensitive details.**

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting if it is enabled, or contact the maintainer through a non-public channel if one is available.

If no private route is configured, open a general issue without sensitive details and ask for a private contact route.

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>🚫 What not to put in issues</strong></summary>

- personal data
- customer data
- employee data
- contracts
- security architecture
- API keys
- vendor confidential documents
- screenshots containing sensitive information

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>📝 Template safety</strong></summary>

Completed templates should be stored internally, not committed publicly.

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>🌐 GitHub Pages note</strong></summary>

The Pages site is static and does not intentionally collect form submissions.

The browser-side self-check should not be treated as a data collection system.

</details>
